name: Albertsons Companies, Inc.
message: [AI generated] Albertsons Companies, Inc. is one of the largest food and drug retailers in the United States, serving millions of customers each week. The company operates stores across 35 states and the District of Columbia under 20 leading banners including Albertsons, Safeway, Vons, and Jewel-Osco. In addition to its retail operations, Albertsons also has a health and wellness business and a private brand portfolio.
